title: competitors.json — Discovered & Classified Competitors
description: The roster produced by Competitor Discovery (PRD §Competitor Discovery). Each entry's `id` is the canonical join key (entityRef) used by every other per-competitor dataset.

id.description: Stable slug join key referenced by companies/social/marketing/techstack/seo/pricing/report datasets.

name.description: Display name (not confidence-wrapped: identity of the entry itself).

classification.description: Competitor type. Allowed values constrain the enumField value; 'unknown' is the explicit fallback.

similarity_score.description: 0..1 overlap with the own product; drives ranking on the executive dashboard.

discovery_source.description: How this competitor surfaced (search query, 'alternatives to' page, GitHub topic, etc.).
